data.title: Abbott Johnson's new book "ChatGPT Real-Life Quickstart Guide" on Amazon and Goodreads guide writers, students, marketers and businesses on using AI creatively.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, located in Mebane, North Carolina, a new book titled "ChatGPT Real–Life Quickstart Guide" was launched. The book provides a tutorial on how to use ChatGPT for writers, students, marketers, and business professionals to increase productivity and earn money. Available on Amazon and Goodreads, this fresh take on AI highlights its role in enhancing creativity and real-world applications. Readers are excited to delve into this innovative guide.

data.title: Janitorial service market expected to reach US$421.55 billion by 2033, with CAGR of 4.50% from 2025 to 2033. Various key drivers identified.
data.description: A report on the Janitorial Service Market forecasts its growth from US$283.66 billion in 2024 to US$421.55 billion by 2033, representing a CAGR of 4.50% during 2025-2033. Key factors propelling this market include emphasis on sustainability, hygiene, health, employee well-being, and improved productivity. The report "Janitorial Service Market: Trends, Insights & Growth Outlook 2025-2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

data.title: Global cheese powder market to hit USD 895 million by 2028, growing at CAGR of 7.3%. North America leads; Asia Pacific emerging hub.
data.description: The global cheese powder market is valued at US$630 million in 2023 and expected to reach US$895 million by 2028, growing at a rate of 7.3% annually. This growth is driven by the convenience and fast-food industry, with the United States leading in the fast-food sector. Emerging economies in Asia Pacific are also contributing significantly to the demand due to factors like rising disposable incomes and evolving food habits. Increased urbanization and changing food preferences are fueling the growth of processed and cheese-based foods. Cheese powder is being increasingly used in various cuisines worldwide, bridging traditional and modern dishes. Despite this growth, market players face challenges such as health concerns like obesity and high cholesterol, as well as strict labeling regulations. North America is expected to lead in growth due to high demand across various food categories, while Asia Pacific is on the rise.

data.title: Global LNG bunkering market estimated at USD 1.62 Bn in 2025, projected to reach USD 10.44 Bn by 2032 with 30.5% CAGR.
data.description: The global LNG bunkering market is estimated to be worth USD 1.62 billion in 2025, with a projected growth to USD 10.44 billion by 2032, at a CAGR of 30.5%. This growth is driven by stringent environmental regulations by the International Maritime Organization to reduce emissions. Ship-to-ship category is expected to hold over two-fifths of the market share, and the cargo fleet is anticipated to be the most lucrative application. Europe is projected to dominate the market with a 40.8% market share in 2025, while Asia Pacific is emerging as a key region for LNG bunkering companies. The high cost of infrastructure and the rise of alternative fuels like ammonia and hydrogen may limit market growth.

data.title: Global ATV market projected to reach $3.3 billion by 2030 at 8.9% CAGR. Utility ATVs dominate with ≥800 cc engine models. Fastest growth seen in ≥two-seater ATVs for recreation, priced around USD 20,000.
data.description: The global all-terrain vehicle (ATV) market is projected to grow from USD 2.9 billion in 2024 to USD 3.3 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 2.3%, states a recent study by MarketsandMarkets. The market growth is attributed to increased demand across various applications including agriculture, military and defense, and recreation. Factors such as rising interest in outdoor activities, technological advancements like AI and smart features, and safety improvements are boosting the popularity of electric ATVs. The utility segment holds the largest market share due to uses in agriculture and military sectors. Notable purchases include the Indian Army acquiring 250 units of MRZR-D4 ATVs from Polaris Inc. in May 2024. Manufacturers are focusing on R&D to introduce new UTV vehicles with various engine capacity options, like the 2024 Polaris Inc. XPEDITION XP ADV Series SxS UTV model with a 1000 cc engine. Two-seater ATVs are expected to be the fastest-growing segment, especially for recreational and family purposes. Side-by-Side vehicles are becoming more popular, priced from USD 20,000, making them ideal for multi-seater rides. Overall, the growing demand in agriculture and military sectors is expected to drive the future market for utility type ATVs.

data.title: Global suppositories market to reach USD 2.05 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 4.7%. Rising demand due to gastrointestinal disorders & vaginal infections, facing competition from other drug delivery methods. Pharmaceutical innovation presents growth opportunities in emerging markets.
data.description: The global suppositories market was worth US$1.56 billion in 2024, increasing to US$1.63 billion in 2025. It is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.7% from 2025 to 2030, reaching a projected value of US$2.05 billion by the end of that period. The market's growth is driven by the rising prevalence of gastrointestinal disorders, constipation, inflammatory bowel diseases, and vaginal infections. Despite facing competition from other drug delivery methods, such as oral tablets and transdermal patches, suppositories are favored for their effectiveness in cases where oral administration is impractical. Technological advancements, such as nanostructured lipid carriers and 3D printing, offer opportunities for growth, particularly in emerging markets like Asia-Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East. Key players in the market include Bayer AG and Novartis.

data.title: Intellinum reveals new Industry Solutions for Oracle Cloud SCM and ERP, enhancing vertical capabilities.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Dallas, Intellinum™, a trusted partner of Oracle Cloud with a focus on digital supply chain solutions, unveiled a new set of Industry Solutions. These offerings are tailored to enhance Oracle Cloud's primary features with industry-specific upgrades.

data.title: High-Trend International Group (NASDAQ: HTCO) regains Nasdaq compliance on minimum bid price requirement.
data.description: Recently, on August 25, 2025, High-Trend International Group, a global ocean technology company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HTCO, revealed that it had been notified by the Listing Qualifications Department of Nasdaq about certain compliance issues. The company did not provide specific details regarding the notification but emphasized its commitment to addressing any concerns raised by Nasdaq to maintain its listing status. This development has caught the attention of investors and stakeholders, with shares of HTCO possibly experiencing fluctuations in the near future.

data.title: PDD Holdings reports 7% revenue growth to $14.52 billion (103.98 billion Chinese yuan) in Q2 2025, warns profits not sustainable with increased competition in China.
data.description: PDD Holdings (NASDAQ: PDD) stock is trading higher following the release of its fiscal second-quarter 2025 results. The company reported a 7% year-on-year revenue increase to $14.52 billion (103.98 billion Chinese yuan), surpassing analysts' estimated $14.35 billion. Executives emphasized consistent retail sales growth and expressed confidence in China's consumer market potential during the earnings call. While optimistic about the long-term outlook, they cautioned that current profitability levels may not be sustained, anticipating fluctuations in future profits. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC) regains Nasdaq compliance with Listing Rule 5550(b)(1) by meeting stockholders' equity of $2.5 million, announced on Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Celebration, Florida, August 25, 2025 - La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC), a prominent real estate and PropTech company, announced today that it has been informed by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on August 21, 2025, about regaining compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). This rule obligates the company to satisfy at least one of the subsequent criteria: maintaining stockholders' equity of a minimum of $2.5 million (5550(b)(1)), holding a market value of listed securities amounting to at least $35 million (5550(b)(2)), or achieving net income from continuing operations of $500,000 in the most recently finished fiscal year or in two of the three most recent fiscal years (5550(b)(3).

data.title: "Complete Unknown" & "Mission: Impossible" win LMGI Awards. 3 TV locations honored. Kevin Costner & Ilt Jones receive special honors.8879207892
data.description: During the 12th Annual LMGI Awards ceremony in Hollywood, California on August 25, 2025, "The Studio" and "1923" were honored for their excellence in television production. Kevin Costner and Ilt Jones received special recognition for their contributions. The event celebrated the achievements of industry professionals across various categories. The Location Managers Guild International (LMGI) revealed the winners during the ceremony, which recognized outstanding work in the motion picture and television industries.

data.title: FERC approves construction schedule for Glenfarne’s Texas LNG project in Texas, expediting final order process.
data.description: In a recent development, the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) has given the green light to the Texas LNG project. The Final Order allows for the construction and operation of the project, with FERC also approving the construction schedule. This project is set to significantly impact both New York and Brownsville, Texas, and is expected to bring a substantial amount of investment to the region. The re-issued Final Order marks a crucial step forward in the realization of this project, which is anticipated to create numerous job opportunities and boost economic growth in the area.

data.title: Ambilight and NIO join forces to introduce Electrochromic Side Windows in the new ES8 SUV, August 25, 2025.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on August 25, 2025, Ambilight, a renowned smart glass technology company, revealed its collaboration with NIO, a prominent smart electric vehicle manufacturer. This partnership brings forth the integration of Ambilight's Electrochromic (EC) technology into the latest NIO ES8 model, a full-scale flagship SUV designed for various environments.

data.title: Connectbase appoints Shivani York as COO on August 4, 2025, bringing her two decades of experience to lead global connected commerce.
data.description: On August 4, 2025, Connectbase, the Operating System for Transacting in the Connected World, welcomed Shivani York as its new Chief Operating Officer. York brings more than twenty years of experience in leading business transformations. This announcement signifies a significant move for the company in strengthening its leadership.

data.title: Catalyst Solutions successfully launches P3 Implementation in 4 states, started in May 2025.
data.description: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, on August 25, 2025, Catalyst Solutions made an exciting announcement regarding the successful implementation of the Professional Health Partners Services (P3) project. The project officially commenced in May 2025. P3 Health Partners aims to enhance population health management efforts.

data.title: TCL Team Boxing League Finals: Philly Smoke vs NYC Attitude. Season 2 vs Season 1 champs, USA vs World match. August 31 at Renaissance Phoenix Glendale. RSVP to Sergio@TeamCombatLeague.
data.description: The defending champions of Season 2, Philly Smoke, will face off against the Season 1 champions, NYC Attitude, in a highly anticipated matchup. The most exciting competitors from Season 3 are also set to compete in a USA vs. the World format event on Sunday, August 31, 2025. The venue for this event will be the Renaissance Phoenix Glendale. Those interested in attending can send their RSVP via email to Sergio@TeamCombatLeague.
